positive: A stylized, symmetrical arrangement of whimsical forest flora and fauna. Center composition featuring a majestic, bioluminescent moonlit stag silhouetted amongst giant ferns and glowing mushrooms. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and clean Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print aesthetic, rendered with thick, confident outlines and strong, contrasting blocks of color (deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and antique gold accents). Focus on clean, scalable silhouettes and complex yet organized patterns, suitable for printing on fabric. High contrast, volumetric lighting, perfect symmetry, vector art quality, highly detailed.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, jpeg artifacts, noise, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disproportionate, out of frame
